title: Swift Hutt Spacer's Service Depot
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Swift Hutt Spacer's Service Depot''' was a localized business in the city of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. True to their name, the company offered quick repairs for a variety of [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]]. The company was one of a myriad of small businesses owned by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] during the height of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

Following Jabba's death in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], an employee by the name of [[Kisa Shaki]] killed the pit boss and took over the facility. She immediately plunged into violent competition with [[Qes Dollis]] of the [[Sandstorm Shipping Concern]] as they both moved in on Jabba's [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations.

The local [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell, concerned on the effect the resulting gang war would have on the ordinary people of Mos Eisley, asked for help from a group of Alliance agents. When they confronted Kisa, she attempted to threaten them; failing that, she offered them places by her side, drawing a comparison between herself and [[Xim/Legends|Xim]] the Despot.

{{Company-stub}}
